backend/main.mo: IC canister actor including blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence listing affected frontend files, components, and test IDs for settings button and privacy‑link popup.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of many frontend files for planning and reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and OKLCH CSS variable themes for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app wiring providers, global components, header/footer, player, and fullscreen visualization overlay.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary showing a styled fallback UI with reload button and optional technical details.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundAmbian: Clears legacy background‑ambiance localStorage key on mount.
Popup for selecting background ambiance with dynamic positioning and theme/language integration.
frontend/src/components/DurationSelector: Popup for adjusting session duration using a themed slider with escape/click‑outside handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with Privacy Policy link and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyCard.ts: Renders a frequency card with play/stop controls and an optional add-to-playlist button, including temporary checkmark feedback. Manages UI state for playing indicators and playlist interactions.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Displays the app header with theme-aware styling and buttons to open language, theme, and settings popups. Determines localized labels dynamically based on the current language.
frontend/src/components/KidsSleepSoundCa: Renders a kids’ sleep sound card with localized title, play controls, and playlist add/remove feedback. Manages a temporary checkmark state on playlist actions.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Popup for choosing a language, positioned dynamically under the header button and styled according to the active theme. Handles escape key closing, responsive layout, and updates the selected language.
frontend/src/components/MainPlayer.tsx: Main audio player managing playback, durations, playlists, and fullscreen visualization with theme‑adaptive styling. Resolves current item names, formats time, and controls related popups.
frontend/src/components/MoodSpace.tsx: Interactive mood selection grid that highlights the chosen mood and displays recommended sounds. Uses localized labels and glow effects for visual emphasis.
frontend/src/components/PeacefulSoundCar: UI card for playing peaceful sounds with play/stop controls and playlist add/check functionality.
frontend/src/components/PlayerAnimationO: Full‑screen canvas overlay rendering particle and ring animations synchronized to current audio.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPanel.ts: Placeholder component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPopup.ts: Popup UI for managing the active playlist, supporting theme styling, item listing, and close interactions.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedSound: Displays recommended frequencies or sounds with play, session start, and playlist add actions.
frontend/src/components/SessionPanel.tsx: Empty component file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/components/SettingsPopup.ts: Settings modal that positions itself under the settings button and adapts styling based on visual theme.
frontend/src/components/SoundWaveVisuali: Canvas-based animated particle and ring visualization driven by audio frequency, intensity, and theme config; closes on screen click.
Renders theme‑based background images, gradients, animations, and intensity‑driven pulse overlay.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorPop: Popup for selecting visual themes with dynamic positioning, keyboard handling, and theme color previews.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedFrequency: UI for selecting frequencies and sound categories, managing player state, sessions, playlists, and applying theme‑based styles.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedSessionPa: Displays current session progress and controls, or lists predefined sessions to start.
frontend/src/hooks/UnifiedAudioManagerCo: Context provider syncing main player state to the unified audio manager and exposing playback controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity, invalidating related queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioActivation.ts: Provides context to unlock Web Audio on first interaction and shows a brief visual indicator.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundAmbiance: Manages looping ambiance audio with AudioContext, persistence, and coordination with the main player.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth flow using Dfinity AuthClient with login, logout, and persisted identity handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.tsx: Provides language state with localStorage persistence and translation lookup.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayer.tsx: Manages main audio playback queue, modes, timers, and session logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty file noting that no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.tsx: Provides visual theme state with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedAudioManage: Unified audio manager handling Web Audio frequency playback, native audio integration, and real-time intensity monitoring.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedPlaylistMan: Manages adding, removing, and tracking frequency or sound items in the main player's playlist with playback control and loop/timer handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedSessionMana: Controls predefined meditation sessions by building queues, managing timers, and syncing playback state with the main player.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisualization.tsx: Provides a context for toggling fullscreen visualization mode with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind styles, color variables, themes, and utility/component layers including animations and noise backgrounds.
frontend/src/lib/ambianceAssets.ts: Maps ambiance types to static audio asset URLs and provides a helper to resolve the correct file.
frontend/src/lib/androidAudioBridge.ts: Wraps Android WebView audio bridge calls with safety checks and fallback handling for play and stop operations.
frontend/src/lib/androidNativeSoundId.ts: Translates web sound IDs to Android-native resource IDs using explicit mappings or normalized fallbacks.
frontend/src/lib/kidsSleepSounds.ts: Defines a catalog of kids sleep sound metadata grouped by category.
frontend/src/lib/meditationAnimationMapp: Provides mapping from sound IDs or frequencies to animation types and returns detailed animation configurations based on the type.
frontend/src/lib/moodRecommendations.ts: Defines recommended frequencies and sounds for each mood type using a structured mapping.
frontend/src/lib/moods.ts: Defines mood types along with their icons and glow colors for UI representation.
frontend/src/lib/peacefulSounds.ts: Exports a list of peaceful sound IDs with simple titles used across the app.
frontend/src/lib/translations.ts: Defines language options and a large translation schema with localized strings for multiple UI sections.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers before rendering App.
frontend/src/startupDiagnostics.ts: Empty placeholder file for potential startup diagnostics logic.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS theme, colors, animations, breakpoints, and plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project's state, including requirements to add a top-right Settings button that links to the Privacy Policy.
